parameters.label: Frequency Penalty
parameters.helpText: Number between -2.0 and 2.0. Penalizes new tokens based on their existing frequency.

parameters.label: Temperature
parameters.helpText: What sampling temperature to use. Higher values make output more random.

parameters.label: Top P
parameters.helpText: Alternative to sampling with temperature, for nucleus sampling.

parameters.label: Presence Penalty
parameters.helpText: Number between -2.0 and 2.0. Penalizes new tokens based on whether they've appeared in the text so far.

parameters.label: Max Completion Tokens
parameters.helpText: Upper bound for tokens generated in the completion.
parameters.errorMessage: Please provide a positive integer for max_completion_tokens.

parameters.label: Tool Choices
parameters.helpText: How the model should select which tool (or tools) to use when generating a response.

parameters.label: Response Format
parameters.helpText: Specifies the format for model output. Enter as JSON.

parameters.label: Stop Sequences
parameters.helpText: Comma-separated sequences where generation will stop (server-specific limits may apply).

parameters.label: Seed
parameters.helpText: Seed for deterministic sampling if the server supports it.
